verses.latin_vulgate: Igitur in octavodecimo anno regni Jeroboam filii Nabat, regnavit Abiam super Judam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבִשְׁנַת֙ שְׁמֹנֶ֣ה עֶשְׂרֵ֔ה לַמֶּ֖לֶךְ יָרׇבְעָ֣ם בֶּן־נְבָ֑ט מָלַ֥ךְ אֲבִיָּ֖ם עַל־יְהוּדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now in the eighteenth year of the reign of Jeroboam, the son of Nabat, Abiam reigned over Juda.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin oli kuningas Jerobeamin Nebatin pojan kahdeksantena vuotena toistakymmentä Abiam kuningas Juudassa,
verses.king_james: Now in the eighteenth year of king Jeroboam the son of Nebat reigned Abijam over Judah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tribus annis regnavit in Jerusalem : nomen matris ejus Maacha filia Abessalom.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁלֹ֣שׁ שָׁנִ֔ים מָלַ֖ךְ בִּירוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם וְשֵׁ֣ם אִמּ֔וֹ מַעֲכָ֖ה בַּת־אֲבִישָׁלֽוֹם׃
verses.douay_rheims: He reigned three years in Jerusalem: the name of his mother was Maacha, the daughter of Abessalom.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hallitsi kolme ajastaikaa Jerusalemissa; hänen äitinsä nimi oli Maeka Abisalomin tytär.
verses.king_james: Three years reigned he in Jerusalem. And his mother’s name was Maachah, the daughter of Abishalom.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ambulavitque in omnibus peccatis patris sui, quæ fecerat ante eum : nec erat cor ejus perfectum cum Domino Deo suo, sicut cor David patris ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֕לֶךְ בְּכׇל־חַטֹּ֥אות אָבִ֖יו אֲשֶׁר־עָשָׂ֣ה לְפָנָ֑יו וְלֹא־הָיָ֨ה לְבָב֤וֹ שָׁלֵם֙ עִם־יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהָ֔יו כִּלְבַ֖ב דָּוִ֥ד אָבִֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he walked in all the sins of his father, which he had done before him: and his heart was not perfect with the Lord his God, as was the heart of David, his father.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän vaelsi kaikissa isänsä synneissä, jotka hän oli tehnyt hänen edellänsä, ja ei ollut hänen sydämensä vakaa Herran hänen Jumalansa edessä, niinkuin Davidin hänen isänsä sydän oli.
verses.king_james: And he walked in all the sins of his father, which he had done before him: and his heart was not perfect with the Lord his God, as the heart of David his father.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed propter David dedit ei Dominus Deus suus lucernam in Jerusalem, ut suscitaret filium ejus post eum, et statueret Jerusalem :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֚י לְמַ֣עַן דָּוִ֔ד נָתַן֩ יְהֹוָ֨ה אֱלֹהָ֥יו ל֛וֹ נִ֖יר בִּירוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם לְהָקִ֤ים אֶת־בְּנוֹ֙ אַחֲרָ֔יו וּֽלְהַעֲמִ֖יד אֶת־יְרוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: But for David's sake the Lord his God gave him a lamp in Jerusalem, to set up his son after him, and to establish Jerusalem:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Davidin tähden antoi Herra hänen Jumalansa hänelle valkeuden Jerusalemissa, herättääksensä hänelle pojan hänen jälkeensä, ja asettaaksensa Jerusalemiin;
verses.king_james: Nevertheless for David’s sake did the Lord his God give him a lamp in Jerusalem, to set up his son after him, and to establish Jerusalem:

verses.latin_vulgate: eo quod fecisset David rectum in oculis Domini, et non declinasset ab omnibus quæ præceperat ei cunctis diebus vitæ suæ, excepto sermone Uriæ Hethæi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲשֶׁ֨ר עָשָׂ֥ה דָוִ֛ד אֶת־הַיָּשָׁ֖ר בְּעֵינֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה וְלֹא־סָ֞ר מִכֹּ֣ל אֲשֶׁר־צִוָּ֗הוּ כֹּ֚ל יְמֵ֣י חַיָּ֔יו רַ֕ק בִּדְבַ֖ר אוּרִיָּ֥ה הַֽחִתִּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Because David had done that which was right in the eyes of the Lord, and had not turned aside from any thing that he commanded him, all the days of his life, except the matter of Urias, the Hethite.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä David oli tehnyt mitä oikein on Herran edessä, ja ei poikennut kaikista, mitä hän hänelle käskenyt oli, kaikkena elinaikanansa, paitsi Urian Hetiläisen asiaa.
verses.king_james: Because David did that which was right in the eyes of the Lord, and turned not aside from any thing that he commanded him all the days of his life, save only in the matter of Uriah the Hittite.

verses.latin_vulgate: Attamen bellum fuit inter Roboam et Jeroboam omni tempore vitæ ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִלְחָמָ֨ה הָיְתָ֧ה בֵין־רְחַבְעָ֛ם וּבֵ֥ין יָרׇבְעָ֖ם כׇּל־יְמֵ֥י חַיָּֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: But there was war between Roboam and Jeroboam all the time of his life.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Rehabeam ja Jerobeam sotivat keskenänsä kaiken elinaikansa.
verses.king_james: And there was war between Rehoboam and Jeroboam all the days of his life.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reliqua autem sermonum Abiam, et omnia quæ fecit, nonne hæc scripta sunt in libro verborum dierum regum Juda ? Fuitque prælium inter Abiam et inter Jeroboam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיֶ֨תֶר דִּבְרֵ֤י אֲבִיָּם֙ וְכׇל־אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשָׂ֔ה הֲלוֹא־הֵ֣ם כְּתוּבִ֗ים עַל־סֵ֛פֶר דִּבְרֵ֥י הַיָּמִ֖ים לְמַלְכֵ֣י יְהוּדָ֑ה וּמִלְחָמָ֥ה הָיְתָ֛ה בֵּ֥ין אֲבִיָּ֖ם וּבֵ֥ין יָרׇבְעָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the rest of the words of Abiam, and all that he did, are they not written in the book of the words of the days of the kings of Juda? And there was war between Abiam and Jeroboam.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mitä enempi on sanomista Abiamista ja kaikista hänen töistänsä, eikö se ole kirjoitettu Juudan kuningasten aikakirjassa? Ja Abiam soti Jerobeamin kanssa.
verses.king_james: Now the rest of the acts of Abijam, and all that he did, are they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah? And there was war between Abijam and Jeroboam.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dormivit Abiam cum patribus suis, et sepelierunt eum in civitate David, regnavitque Asa filius ejus pro eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁכַּ֤ב אֲבִיָּם֙ עִם־אֲבֹתָ֔יו וַיִּקְבְּר֥וּ אֹת֖וֹ בְּעִ֣יר דָּוִ֑ד וַיִּמְלֹ֛ךְ אָסָ֥א בְנ֖וֹ תַּחְתָּֽיו׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And Abiam slept with his fathers, and they buried him in the city of David: and Asa, his son, reigned in his stead.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Abiam nukkui isäinsä kanssa ja haudattiin Davidin kaupunkiin; ja Asa hänen poikansa hallitsi hänen perässänsä.
verses.king_james: And Abijam slept with his fathers; and they buried him in the city of David: and Asa his son reigned in his stead.

verses.latin_vulgate: In anno ergo vigesimo Jeroboam regis Israël regnavit Asa rex Juda,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבִשְׁנַ֣ת עֶשְׂרִ֔ים לְיָרׇבְעָ֖ם מֶ֣לֶךְ יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל מָלַ֥ךְ אָסָ֖א מֶ֥לֶךְ יְהוּדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: So in the twentieth year of Jeroboam, king of Israel, reigned Asa, king of Juda,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kahdentenakymmenentenä Jerobeamin Israelin kuninkaan vuonna oli Asa kuningas Juudassa.
verses.king_james: And in the twentieth year of Jeroboam king of Israel reigned Asa over Judah.

verses.latin_vulgate: et quadraginta et uno anno regnavit in Jerusalem. Nomen matris ejus Maacha filia Abessalom.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַרְבָּעִ֤ים וְאַחַת֙ שָׁנָ֔ה מָלַ֖ךְ בִּירוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם וְשֵׁ֣ם אִמּ֔וֹ מַעֲכָ֖ה בַּת־אֲבִישָׁלֽוֹם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he reigned one and forty years in Jerusalem. His mother's name was Maacha, the daughter of Abessalom.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hallitsi yhden ajastajan viidettäkymmentä Jerusalemissa; hänen äitinsä nimi oli Maeka Abisalomin tytär.
verses.king_james: And forty and one years reigned he in Jerusalem. And his mother’s name was Maachah, the daughter of Abishalom.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et fecit Asa rectum ante conspectum Domini, sicut David pater ejus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֧עַשׂ אָסָ֛א הַיָּשָׁ֖ר בְּעֵינֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה כְּדָוִ֖ד אָבִֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Asa did that which was right in the sight of the Lord, as did David, his father:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Asa teki kelvollisesti Herran edessä, niinkuin David hänen isänsä,
verses.king_james: And Asa did that which was right in the eyes of the Lord, as did David his father.

verses.latin_vulgate: et abstulit effeminatos de terra, purgavitque universas sordes idolorum quæ fecerant patres ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעֲבֵ֥ר הַקְּדֵשִׁ֖ים מִן־הָאָ֑רֶץ וַיָּ֙סַר֙ אֶת־כׇּל־הַגִּלֻּלִ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר עָשׂ֖וּ אֲבֹתָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he took away the effeminate out of the land, and removed all the filth of the idols, which his fathers had made.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja karkoitti huorintekijät maalta, ja ajoi pois kaikki epäjumalat, jotka hänen isänsä tehneet olivat.
verses.king_james: And he took away the sodomites out of the land, and removed all the idols that his fathers had made.

verses.latin_vulgate: Insuper et Maacham matrem suam amovit, ne esset princeps in sacris Priapi, et in luco ejus quem consecraverat : subvertitque specum ejus, et confregit simulacrum turpissimum, et combussit in torrente Cedron :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגַ֣ם ׀ אֶת־מַעֲכָ֣ה אִמּ֗וֹ וַיְסִרֶ֙הָ֙ מִגְּבִירָ֔ה אֲשֶׁר־עָשְׂתָ֥ה מִפְלֶ֖צֶת לָאֲשֵׁרָ֑ה וַיִּכְרֹ֤ת אָסָא֙ אֶת־מִפְלַצְתָּ֔הּ וַיִּשְׂרֹ֖ף בְּנַ֥חַל קִדְרֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Moreover, he also removed his mother, Maacha, from being the princess in the sacrifices of Priapus, and in the grove which she had consecrated to him: and he destroyed her den, and broke in pieces the filthy idol, and burnt it by the torrent Cedron:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja vielä sitten pani hän äitinsä Maekan viralta pois, että hän oli tehnyt Mipletsetin metsistön; vaan Asa kukisti hänen Mipletsetinsä ja poltti sen Kidronin ojan tykönä.
verses.king_james: And also Maachah his mother, even her he removed from being queen, because she had made an idol in a grove; and Asa destroyed her idol, and burnt it by the brook Kidron.

verses.latin_vulgate: excelsa autem non abstulit. Verumtamen cor Asa perfectum erat cum Domino cunctis diebus suis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַבָּמ֖וֹת לֹא־סָ֑רוּ רַ֣ק לְבַב־אָסָ֗א הָיָ֥ה שָׁלֵ֛ם עִם־יְהֹוָ֖ה כׇּל־יָמָֽיו׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: But the high places he did not take away. Nevertheless, the heart of Asa was perfect with the Lord all his days:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta kukkuloita ei hän kukistanut; kuitenkin Asan sydän oli vakaa Herran edessä kaiken elinaikansa.
verses.king_james: But the high places were not removed: nevertheless Asa’s heart was perfect with the Lord all his days.

verses.latin_vulgate: et intulit ea quæ sanctificaverat pater suus, et voverat, in domum Domini, argentum, et aurum, et vasa.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֵא֙ אֶת־קׇדְשֵׁ֣י אָבִ֔יו (וקדשו) [וְקׇדְשֵׁ֖י] בֵּ֣ית יְהֹוָ֑ה כֶּ֥סֶף וְזָהָ֖ב וְכֵלִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he brought in the things which his father had dedicated, and he had vowed, into the house of the Lord, silver and gold, and vessels.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän vei sisälle mitä hänen isänsä oli pyhittänyt, ja Herran huoneen pyhät kalut: hopian ja kullan ja astiat.
verses.king_james: And he brought in the things which his father had dedicated, and the things which himself had dedicated, into the house of the Lord, silver, and gold, and vessels.

verses.latin_vulgate: Bellum autem erat inter Asa, et Baasa regem Israël cunctis diebus eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִלְחָמָ֨ה הָיְתָ֜ה בֵּ֣ין אָסָ֗א וּבֵ֛ין בַּעְשָׁ֥א מֶלֶךְ־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל כׇּל־יְמֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And there was war between Asa, and Baasa, king of Israel, all their days.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Asan ja Baesan Israelin kuninkaan välillä oli sota kaiken heidän elinaikansa.
verses.king_james: And there was war between Asa and Baasha king of Israel all their days.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ascendit quoque Baasa rex Israël in Judam, et ædificavit Rama, ut non posset quispiam egredi vel ingredi de parte Asa regis Juda.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֨עַל בַּעְשָׁ֤א מֶֽלֶךְ־יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ עַל־יְהוּדָ֔ה וַיִּ֖בֶן אֶת־הָרָמָ֑ה לְבִלְתִּ֗י תֵּ֚ת יֹצֵ֣א וָבָ֔א לְאָסָ֖א מֶ֥לֶךְ יְהוּדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Baasa, king of Israel, went up against Juda, and built Rama, that no man might go out or come in of the side of Asa, king of Juda.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan Baesa Israelin kuningas nousi Juudaa vastaan ja rakensi Raman, ettei yksikään vaeltaisi ulos taikka sisälle Asan Juudan kuninkaan puolelta.
verses.king_james: And Baasha king of Israel went up against Judah, and built Ramah, that he might not suffer any to go out or come in to Asa king of Judah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tollens itaque Asa omne argentum et aurum quod remanserat in thesauris domus Domini, et in thesauris domus regiæ, et dedit illud in manus servorum suorum : et misit ad Benadad filium Tabremon filii Hezion, regem Syriæ, qui habitabat in Damasco, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקַּ֣ח אָ֠סָ֠א אֶת־כׇּל־הַכֶּ֨סֶף וְהַזָּהָ֜ב הַנּוֹתָרִ֣ים ׀ בְּאוֹצְר֣וֹת בֵּית־יְהֹוָ֗ה וְאֶת־אֽוֹצְרוֹת֙ בֵּ֣ית (מלך) [הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ] וַֽיִּתְּנֵ֖ם בְּיַד־עֲבָדָ֑יו וַיִּשְׁלָחֵ֞ם הַמֶּ֣לֶךְ אָסָ֗א אֶל־בֶּן־הֲ֠דַ֠ד בֶּן־טַבְרִמֹּ֤ן בֶּן־חֶזְיוֹן֙ מֶ֣לֶךְ אֲרָ֔ם הַיֹּשֵׁ֥ב בְּדַמֶּ֖שֶׂק לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then Asa took all the silver and gold that remained in the treasures of the house of the Lord, and in the treasures of the king's house, and delivered it into the hands of his servants: and sent them to Benadad, son of Tabremon, the son of Hezion, king of Syria, who dwelt in Damascus, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin otti Asa kaiken hopian ja kullan, jotka Herran huoneen tavaroista ja kuninkaan huoneen tavaroista jääneet olivat, ja antoi ne palveliansa käsiin, jotka kuningas Asa lähetti Benhadadille Tabrimmonin Hesionin pojan pojalle Syrian kuninkaalle, joka asui Damaskussa, ja käski sanoa hänelle:
verses.king_james: Then Asa took all the silver and the gold that were left in the treasures of the house of the Lord, and the treasures of the king’s house, and delivered them into the hand of his servants: and king Asa sent them to Ben–hadad, the son of Tabrimon, the son of Hezion, king of Syria, that dwelt at Damascus, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Fœdus est inter me et te, et inter patrem meum et patrem tuum : ideo misi tibi munera, argentum et aurum : et peto ut venias, et irritum facias fœdus quod habes cum Baasa rege Israël, et recedat a me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּרִית֙ בֵּינִ֣י וּבֵינֶ֔ךָ בֵּ֥ין אָבִ֖י וּבֵ֣ין אָבִ֑יךָ הִנֵּה֩ שָׁלַ֨חְתִּי לְךָ֥ שֹׁ֙חַד֙ כֶּ֣סֶף וְזָהָ֔ב לֵ֣ךְ הָפֵ֗רָה אֶת־בְּרִֽיתְךָ֙ אֶת־בַּעְשָׁ֣א מֶלֶךְ־יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וְיַעֲלֶ֖ה מֵֽעָלָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: There is a league between me and thee, and between my father and thy father: therefore I have sent thee presents of silver and gold: and I desire thee to come, and break thy league with Baasa, king of Israel, that he may depart from me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minun ja sinun vaiheella, ja minun isäni ja sinun isäs vaiheella on liitto: katso minä lähetin sinulle hopiaa ja kultaa lahjaksi, ettäs rikkoisit sen liiton, minkä sinä Baesan Israelin kuninkaan kanssa tehnyt olet, että hän erkanis minusta.
verses.king_james: There is a league between me and thee, and between my father and thy father: behold, I have sent unto thee a present of silver and gold; come and break thy league with Baasha king of Israel, that he may depart from me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Acquiescens Benadad regi Asa, misit principes exercitus sui in civitates Israël, et percusserunt Ahion, et Dan, et Abeldomum Maacha, et universam Cenneroth, omnem scilicet terram Nephthali.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁמַ֨ע בֶּן־הֲדַ֜ד אֶל־הַמֶּ֣לֶךְ אָסָ֗א וַ֠יִּשְׁלַ֠ח אֶת־שָׂרֵ֨י הַחֲיָלִ֤ים אֲשֶׁר־לוֹ֙ עַל־עָרֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וַיַּךְ֙ אֶת־עִיּ֣וֹן וְאֶת־דָּ֔ן וְאֵ֖ת אָבֵ֣ל בֵּֽית־מַעֲכָ֑ה וְאֵת֙ כׇּל־כִּנְר֔וֹת עַ֖ל כׇּל־אֶ֥רֶץ נַפְתָּלִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Benadad, hearkening to king Asa, sent the captains of his army against the cities of Israel, and they smote Ahion, and Dan, and Abeldomum Maacha, and all Cenneroth; that is all the land of Nephthali.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Benhadad oli kuuliainen kuningas Asalle, ja lähetti sodanpäämiehet Israelin kaupunkeihin, ja löi Iionin ja Danin ja Abelin Betmaekan, ja koko Kinerotin, ynnä kaiken Naphtalin maakunnan kanssa.
verses.king_james: So Ben–hadad hearkened unto king Asa, and sent the captains of the hosts which he had against the cities of Israel, and smote Ijon, and Dan, and Abel–beth–maachah, and all Cinneroth, with all the land of Naphtali.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quod cum audisset Baasa, intermisit ædificare Rama, et reversus est in Thersa.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי֙ כִּשְׁמֹ֣עַ בַּעְשָׁ֔א וַיֶּחְדַּ֕ל מִבְּנ֖וֹת אֶת־הָרָמָ֑ה וַיֵּ֖שֶׁב בְּתִרְצָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when Baasa had heard this, he left off building Rama, and returned into Thersa.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Baesa sen kuuli, lakkasi hän rakentamasta Ramaa, ja meni Tirtsaan.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass, when Baasha heard thereof, that he left off building of Ramah, and dwelt in Tirzah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Rex autem Asa nuntium misit in omnem Judam, dicens : Nemo sit excusatus. Et tulerunt lapides de Rama, et ligna ejus, quibus ædificaverat Baasa, et exstruxit de eis rex Asa Gabaa Benjamin, et Maspha.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַמֶּ֨לֶךְ אָסָ֜א הִשְׁמִ֤יעַ אֶת־כׇּל־יְהוּדָה֙ אֵ֣ין נָקִ֔י וַיִּשְׂא֞וּ אֶת־אַבְנֵ֤י הָֽרָמָה֙ וְאֶת־עֵצֶ֔יהָ אֲשֶׁ֥ר בָּנָ֖ה בַּעְשָׁ֑א וַיִּ֤בֶן בָּם֙ הַמֶּ֣לֶךְ אָסָ֔א אֶת־גֶּ֥בַע בִּנְיָמִ֖ן וְאֶת־הַמִּצְפָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: But king Asa sent word into all Juda, saying: Let no man be excused: and they took away the stones from Rama, and the timber thereof, wherewith Baasa had been building, and with them king Asa built Gabaa of Benjamin, and Maspha.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta kuningas Asa lähetti sanoman kaiken Juudan ympäri: ei tässä pidä yksikään nuhteetoin oleman. Ja he kukistivat kivet ja puut Ramasta, joita Baesa oli rakentanut; ja kuningas Asa rakensi niistä Geban BanJaminista ja Mitspan.
verses.king_james: Then king Asa made a proclamation throughout all Judah; none was exempted: and they took away the stones of Ramah, and the timber thereof, wherewith Baasha had builded; and king Asa built with them Geba of Benjamin, and Mizpah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reliqua autem omnium sermonum Asa, et universæ fortitudines ejus, et cuncta quæ fecit, et civitates quas exstruxit, nonne hæc scripta sunt in libro verborum dierum regum Juda ? Verumtamen in tempore senectutis suæ doluit pedes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיֶ֣תֶר כׇּל־דִּבְרֵֽי־אָ֠סָ֠א וְכׇל־גְּב֨וּרָת֜וֹ וְכׇל־אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשָׂ֗ה וְהֶֽעָרִים֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר בָּנָ֔ה הֲלֹא־הֵ֣מָּה כְתוּבִ֗ים עַל־סֵ֛פֶר דִּבְרֵ֥י הַיָּמִ֖ים לְמַלְכֵ֣י יְהוּדָ֑ה רַ֚ק לְעֵ֣ת זִקְנָת֔וֹ חָלָ֖ה אֶת־רַגְלָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: But the rest of all the acts of Asa, and all his strength, and all that he did, and the cities that he built, are they not written in the book of the words of the days of the kings of Juda? But in the time of his old age he was diseased in his feet.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mitä muuta on kuningas Asasta puhumista, ja kaikesta hänen vallastansa, ja kaikista hänen töistänsä, ja kaupungeista, jotka hän rakentanut oli: eikö se ole kirjoitettu Juudan kuningasten aikakirjassa? paitsi että hän oli vanhuudellansa sairas jaloista.
verses.king_james: The rest of all the acts of Asa, and all his might, and all that he did, and the cities which he built, are they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah? Nevertheless in the time of his old age he was diseased in his feet.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dormivit cum patribus suis, et sepultus est cum eis in civitate David patris sui. Regnavitque Josaphat filius ejus pro eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁכַּ֤ב אָסָא֙ עִם־אֲבֹתָ֔יו וַיִּקָּבֵר֙ עִם־אֲבֹתָ֔יו בְּעִ֖יר דָּוִ֣ד אָבִ֑יו וַיִּמְלֹ֛ךְ יְהוֹשָׁפָ֥ט בְּנ֖וֹ תַּחְתָּֽיו׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And he slept with his fathers, and was buried with them in the city of David, his father. And Josaphat, his son, reigned in his place.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Asa nukkui isäinsä kanssa ja haudattiin isäinsä kanssa isänsä Davidin kaupunkiin. Ja Josaphat hänen poikansa tuli kuninkaaksi hänen peräänsä.
verses.king_james: And Asa slept with his fathers, and was buried with his fathers in the city of David his father: and Jehoshaphat his son reigned in his stead.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nadab vero filius Jeroboam regnavit super Israël anno secundo Asa regis Juda : regnavitque super Israël duobus annis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָדָ֣ב בֶּן־יָרׇבְעָ֗ם מָלַךְ֙ עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל בִּשְׁנַ֣ת שְׁתַּ֔יִם לְאָסָ֖א מֶ֣לֶךְ יְהוּדָ֑ה וַיִּמְלֹ֥ךְ עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל שְׁנָתָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: But Nadab, the son of Jeroboam, reigned over Israel the second year of Asa, king of Juda: and he reigned over Israel two years.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Nadab Jerobeamin poika oli Israelin kuningas toisena Asan Juudan kuninkaan vuonna, ja hallitsi Israelissa kaksi vuotta,
verses.king_james: And Nadab the son of Jeroboam began to reign over Israel in the second year of Asa king of Judah, and reigned over Israel two years.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et fecit quod malum est in conspectu Domini, et ambulavit in viis patris sui, et in peccatis ejus quibus peccare fecit Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֥עַשׂ הָרַ֖ע בְּעֵינֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה וַיֵּ֙לֶךְ֙ בְּדֶ֣רֶךְ אָבִ֔יו וּ֨בְחַטָּאת֔וֹ אֲשֶׁ֥ר הֶחֱטִ֖יא אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he did evil in the sight of the Lord, and walked in the ways of his father, and in his sins, wherewith he made Israel to sin.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja teki pahaa Herran edessä, ja vaelsi isänsä teillä ja hänen synneissänsä, joilla hän saatti Israelin syntiä tekemään.
verses.king_james: And he did evil in the sight of the Lord, and walked in the way of his father, and in his sin wherewith he made Israel to sin.

verses.latin_vulgate: Insidiatus est autem ei Baasa filius Ahiæ de domo Issachar, et percussit eum in Gebbethon, quæ est urbs Philisthinorum : siquidem Nadab et omnis Israël obsidebant Gebbethon.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְשֹׁ֨ר עָלָ֜יו בַּעְשָׁ֤א בֶן־אֲחִיָּה֙ לְבֵ֣ית יִשָּׂשכָ֔ר וַיַּכֵּ֣הוּ בַעְשָׁ֔א בְּגִבְּת֖וֹן אֲשֶׁ֣ר לַפְּלִשְׁתִּ֑ים וְנָדָב֙ וְכׇל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל צָרִ֖ים עַֽל־גִּבְּתֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Baasa, the son of Ahias, of the house of Issachar, conspired against him, and slew him in Gebbethon, which is a city of the Philistines: for Nadab and all Israel besieged Gebbethon.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Baesa Ahian poika Isaskarin huoneesta teki liiton häntä vastaan, ja Baesa löi hänen Philistealaisten Gibetonissa; sillä Nadab ja koko Israel piirittivät Gibetonin.
verses.king_james: And Baasha the son of Ahijah, of the house of Issachar, conspired against him; and Baasha smote him at Gibbethon, which belonged to the Philistines; for Nadab and all Israel laid siege to Gibbethon.

verses.latin_vulgate: Interfecit ergo illum Baasa in anno tertio Asa regis Juda, et regnavit pro eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְמִתֵ֣הוּ בַעְשָׁ֔א בִּשְׁנַ֣ת שָׁלֹ֔שׁ לְאָסָ֖א מֶ֣לֶךְ יְהוּדָ֑ה וַיִּמְלֹ֖ךְ תַּחְתָּֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: So Baasa slew him in the third year of Asa, king of Juda, and reigned in his place.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sitte tappoi Baesa hänen kolmantena Asan Juudan kuninkaan vuonna, ja tuli kuninkaaksi hänen siaansa.
verses.king_james: Even in the third year of Asa king of Judah did Baasha slay him, and reigned in his stead.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque regnasset, percussit omnem domum Jeroboam : non dimisit ne unam quidem animam de semine ejus donec deleret eum, juxta verbum Domini quod locutus fuerat in manu servi sui Ahiæ Silonitis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֣י כְמׇלְכ֗וֹ הִכָּה֙ אֶת־כׇּל־בֵּ֣ית יָרׇבְעָ֔ם לֹא־הִשְׁאִ֧יר כׇּל־נְשָׁמָ֛ה לְיָרׇבְעָ֖ם עַד־הִשְׁמִד֑וֹ כִּדְבַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֣ר דִּבֶּ֔ר בְּיַד־עַבְדּ֖וֹ אֲחִיָּ֥ה הַשִּׁילֹנִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when he was king, he cut off all the house of Jeroboam: he left not so much as one soul of his seed, till he had utterly destroyed him, according to the word of the Lord, which he had spoken in the hand of Ahias, the Silonite:
verses.finnish_biblia: Koska hän oli kuningas, löi hän kuoliaaksi kaiken Jerobeamin huoneen, ja ei jättänyt yhtään ainoaa henkeä Jerobeamin huoneesta, siihenasti että hän hävitti hänen, Herran sanan jälkeen, joka oli sanottu hänen palvelialtansa Ahialta Silosta,
verses.king_james: And it came to pass, when he reigned, that he smote all the house of Jeroboam; he left not to Jeroboam any that breathed, until he had destroyed him, according unto the saying of the Lord, which he spake by his servant Ahijah the Shilonite:

verses.latin_vulgate: propter peccata Jeroboam, quæ peccaverat, et quibus peccare fecerat Israël : et propter delictum quo irritaverat Dominum Deum Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־חַטֹּ֤אות יָֽרׇבְעָם֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר חָטָ֔א וַאֲשֶׁ֥ר הֶחֱטִ֖יא אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל בְּכַעְס֕וֹ אֲשֶׁ֣ר הִכְעִ֔יס אֶת־יְהֹוָ֖ה אֱלֹהֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Because of the sin of Jeroboam, which he had sinned, and wherewith he had made Israel to sin, and for the offence wherewith he provoked the Lord, the God of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jerobeamin syntein tähden, jotka hän teki, ja jolla hän saatti Israelin syntiä tekemään, sillä vihoittamisella, jolla hän vihaan kehoitti Herran Israelin Jumalan.
verses.king_james: Because of the sins of Jeroboam which he sinned, and which he made Israel sin, by his provocation wherewith he provoked the Lord God of Israel to anger.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reliqua autem sermonum Nadab, et omnia quæ operatus est, nonne hæc scripta sunt in libro verborum dierum regum Israël ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיֶ֛תֶר דִּבְרֵ֥י נָדָ֖ב וְכׇל־אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשָׂ֑ה הֲלֹא־הֵ֣ם כְּתוּבִ֗ים עַל־סֵ֛פֶר דִּבְרֵ֥י הַיָּמִ֖ים לְמַלְכֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: But the rest of the acts of Nadab, and all that he did, are they not written in the book of the words of the days of the kings of Israel?
verses.finnish_biblia: Mitä enempi Nadabista on sanomista ja kaikista hänen töistänsä: eikö se ole kirjoitettu Israelin kuningasten aikakirjassa?
verses.king_james: Now the rest of the acts of Nadab, and all that he did, are they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel?

verses.latin_vulgate: Fuitque bellum inter Asa, et Baasa regem Israël, cunctis diebus eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִלְחָמָ֨ה הָיְתָ֜ה בֵּ֣ין אָסָ֗א וּבֵ֛ין בַּעְשָׁ֥א מֶֽלֶךְ־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל כׇּל־יְמֵיהֶֽם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And there was war between Asa and Baasa, the king of Israel, all their days.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Asa ja Baesa Israelin kuningas sotivat keskenänsä kaiken ikänsä.
verses.king_james: And there was war between Asa and Baasha king of Israel all their days.

verses.latin_vulgate: Anno tertio Asa regis Juda, regnavit Baasa filius Ahiæ super omnem Israël in Thersa, viginti quatuor annis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּשְׁנַ֣ת שָׁלֹ֔שׁ לְאָסָ֖א מֶ֣לֶךְ יְהוּדָ֑ה מָ֠לַ֠ךְ בַּעְשָׁ֨א בֶן־אֲחִיָּ֤ה עַל־כׇּל־יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ בְּתִרְצָ֔ה עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וְאַרְבַּ֖ע שָׁנָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the third year of Asa, king of Juda, Baasa, the son of Ahias, reigned over all Israel, in Thersa, four and twenty years.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kolmantena Asan Juudan kuninkaan vuonna oli Baesa Ahian poika koko Israelin kuningas Tirtsassa, neljäkolmattakymmentä ajastaikaa.
verses.king_james: In the third year of Asa king of Judah began Baasha the son of Ahijah to reign over all Israel in Tirzah, twenty and four years.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et fecit malum coram Domino, ambulavitque in via Jeroboam, et in peccatis ejus quibus peccare fecit Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֥עַשׂ הָרַ֖ע בְּעֵינֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה וַיֵּ֙לֶךְ֙ בְּדֶ֣רֶךְ יָרׇבְעָ֔ם וּ֨בְחַטָּאת֔וֹ אֲשֶׁ֥ר הֶחֱטִ֖יא אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And he did evil before the Lord, and walked in the ways of Jeroboam, and in his sins, wherewith he made Israel to sin.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän teki pahaa Herran edessä, ja vaelsi Jerobeamin teillä ja hänen synneissänsä, joilla hän saatti Israelin syntiä tekemään.
verses.king_james: And he did evil in the sight of the Lord, and walked in the way of Jeroboam, and in his sin wherewith he made Israel to sin.
